data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Collections/escalation states', but the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations regarding the implementation of this feature. The linked use case explicitly mentions the need for collections/escalation states, yet there is no evidence demonstrating that this functionality is present or functioning as required in the current saga run. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of collections/escalation states implementation or validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the collections/escalation states requirement.
